title: Polish mobile and responsive workspace surfaces
description: Finish the existing responsive UI refinement by adding safe-area header spacing, mobile-friendly empty-state buttons, discoverable tab overflow, better markdown spacing, and dynamic bottom clearance on non-chat route pages.

title: Promote viewport screenshots into repeatable smoke coverage
description: Convert the local screenshot capture helper into a documented smoke script that stores transient artifacts outside tracked source and validates key routes across common breakpoints.

title: Separate baseline lint debt from changed-file lint regressions
description: Add a focused lint/reporting gate for cron cycles so known repository-wide strict-type lint debt does not mask new regressions in modified files.

title: Move screenshot smoke artifacts out of the tracked workspace tree
description: Relocate viewport screenshots to an ignored temp/report directory and document a stable command so visual smoke checks do not leave repo-root noise after cron cycles.

title: Add CSS-specific lint or style validation for responsive utilities
description: ESLint ignores src/styles.css, so add a lightweight CSS validation/stylelint path for Tailwind utility and media-query regressions.

title: Reconcile feature/chat-ui-improvements with origin/main
description: Resolve branch divergence so verified responsive UI commits can be merged cleanly rather than repeatedly deploying from a long-lived feature branch.
